title: T-096 — swap custom jsxPreTransformPlugin → @vitejs/plugin-react-oxc (FT-036)
prompt:
# T-096 — swap custom jsxPreTransformPlugin → @vitejs/plugin-react-oxc (FT-036)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-036** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P2** (S effort)

## Goal
vitest.ui.config.ts uses @vitejs/plugin-react-oxc; custom plugin removed.

## Implementation contract
1. Add `@vitejs/plugin-react-oxc` to apps/web devDependencies.
2. vitest.ui.config.ts replaces the custom plugin with plugin-react-oxc().
3. Remove the custom plugin file.
4. Re-run packages/ui tests; assert no regressions.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/vitest.ui.config.ts [modify]
- apps/web/package.json [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the apps/web vitest.ui.config.ts, when scanned, then it imports plugin-react-oxc and no longer references the custom plugin.
2. Given `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run --config vitest.ui.config.ts`, when run, then all UI tests pass.

## Test strategy
- RED: existing UI test pack acts as the regression suite (no new failing test required).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run --config vitest.ui.config.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not retain both plugins (conflicts).

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Replace the custom jsxPreTransformPlugin with @vitejs/plugin-react-oxc to align Vite/React 19 transforms across UI tests.
pipeline_inputs.details: T-037 introduced a stop-gap jsxPreTransformPlugin to coerce the React 18 JSX runtime. Once FT-033 aligns React 19, swap to the official @vitejs/plugin-react-oxc.
out_of_scope: Do not change apps/web/vitest.config.ts non-ui config.

Given `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run --config vitest.ui.config.ts`, when run, then all UI tests pass.
